链接中的{key}将自动替换为sk-xxxx，{address}将自动替换为系统: In the link, {key} will automatically be replaced with sk-xxxx, and {address} will automatically be replaced with the systems configured server address. Do not include / or /v1 at the end.
你似乎并没有修改什么: It seems you havent modified anything

开启之后将上游地址替换为服务器地址: After enabling, upstream address will be replaced with server address
开启之后会清除用户提示词中的: After enabling, the following parameters will be removed from the user prompt

请选择日志记录时间: Please select a log record time

为一个 JSON 文本，键为模型名称，值为一次调用消耗多少刀，比如 \"gpt-: Enter a JSON object where the key is the model name and the value is the cost per call in tokens, e.g., "gpt-4-gizmo-*": 0.1 for a cost of 0.1 tokens per call
模型补全倍率（仅对自定义模型有效）: Completion Ratio for Models (only effective for custom models)
确定重置模型倍率吗？: Are you sure you want to reset the model ratio?

一行一个屏蔽词，不需要符号分割: One sensitive word per line, no symbols needed for separation

令牌可用额度已用尽，无法启用，请先修改令牌剩余额度，或者设置为无限额度: The available quota of the token has been used up and cannot be enabled. Please modify the remaining quota of the token, or set it to unlimited quota

此项可选，输入镜像站地址，格式为：: This is optional, enter the mirror site address, the format is:
请输入默认 API 版本，例如：2023-03-15-preview，该配置可以: Please enter the default API version, for example: 2023-03-15-preview, this configuration can be overridden by the actual request query parameters
参数替换为你的部署名称（模型名称中的点会被剔除）: Replace the parameter with your deployment name (dots in the model name will be removed)
模型映射必须是合法的 JSON 格式！: Model mapping must be in valid JSON format!
请输入新的剩余额度: Please enter the new remaining quota
请输入单个兑换码中包含的额度: Please enter the quota included in a single redemption code
模型部署名称必须和模型名称保持一致: The model deployment name must be consistent with the model name
，因为 One API 会把请求体中的 model: , because One API will take the model in the request body
请输入自定义渠道的 Base URL: Please enter the Base URL of the custom channel
Authorization callback URL 填: Fill in the Authorization callback URL
此项可选，用于修改请求体中的模型名称，为一个 JSON 字符串，键为请求中模型名: This is optional, used to modify the model name in the request body, it's a JSON string, the key is the model name in the request, and the value is the model name to be replaced, for example:
请输入渠道对应的鉴权密钥: Please enter the authentication key corresponding to the channel
令牌创建成功，请在列表页面点击复制获取令牌！: Token created successfully, please click copy on the list page to get the token!
此项可选，用于通过代理站来进行 API 调用，请输入代理站地址，格式为：http: This is optional, used to make API calls through the proxy site, please enter the proxy site address, the format is: https://domain.com
取消密码登录将导致所有未绑定其他登录方式的用户（包括管理员）无法通过密码登录，确: Canceling password login will cause all users (including administrators) who have not bound other login methods to be unable to log in via password, confirm cancel?
请输入星火大模型版本，注意是接口地址中的版本号，例如：v2.1: Please enter the version of the Starfire model, note that it is the version number in the interface address, for example: v2.1
无权进行此操作，用户信息无效: Unauthorized action, user information is invalid
无权进行此操作，与登录用户不匹配，请重新登录: Unauthorized action, does not match the logged-in user, please log in again
无权进行此操作，登录信息无效，请重新登录: Unauthorized action, invalid login information, please log in again
账号无权进行此操作: Account is unauthorized to perform this action
您输入的值无效: The value you entered is invalid
您的账号未绑定微信: Your account is not bound to WeChat
部署地区必须包含default字段: Deployment area must contain the default field
该任务所属渠道已被禁用: The channel of this task has been disabled
无权进行此操作，用户已被封禁: Unauthorized action, user has been banned
充值数量不能小于 %d: Recharge amount cannot be less than %d
易支付回调失败 未找到配置信息: Easy Payment callback failed: configuration information not found
易支付回调签名验证失败: Easy Payment callback signature verification failed
易支付回调未找到订单: %v: Easy Payment callback: order not found: %v
易支付回调更新订单失败: %v: Easy Payment callback: failed to update order: %v
易支付回调更新用户成功 %v: Easy Payment callback: user updated successfully %v
使用在线充值成功，充值金额: %v，支付金额：%f: Online recharge successful, recharge amount: %v, payment amount: %f
请先填写服务器地址: Please fill in the server address first
请先填写服务器端口: Please fill in the server port first
IP白名单（请勿过度信任此功能）: IP whitelist (don’t trust this feature too much)
启用模型限制（非必要，不建议启用）: Enable model restrictions (not necessary, not recommended)
令牌分组，默认为用户的分组: Token Group, default to user group
